backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing audio post CRUD operations with authorization checks, user content tracking, and blob storage integration via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed header layout changes: reduced vertical padding, decreased spacing between stacked elements, and moved slogan closer to header content.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing, player state, upload flow with 3-hour duration validation, audio recording, and UI components with premium styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SPEAKR application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes, QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, PlayerProvider, and onboarding redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests with a two-column grid layout and scrollable container.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter chips component displaying predefined categories as toggleable buttons with premium styling and shadow effects.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Empty state hero component for dashboard showing welcome message, upload CTA, and UI-only profile completion progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Displays a user's uploaded audio posts with edit, delete, and play functionality. Includes a dialog for editing post metadata and integrates with the player to preview content.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Shows user statistics including total uploads and total listens in a card layout with icons and formatted numbers.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Renders an individual audio post card with play/pause controls, like/dislike buttons, comments toggle, and delete functionality for owned posts. Integrates with the player and tracks listens for backend items.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Displays a list of comments for an audio post with author avatars and timestamps, or shows a placeholder message when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/feed/FeedHeroBan: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Renders either a custom thumbnail or a procedurally generated category-based cover image for audio posts.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Multi-select dropdown for choosing languages with search functionality and the ability to add custom languages. Displays selected count and language labels.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays the SPEAKR branding banner at the top of the page with a dropdown menu and fallback text if the image fails to load.
Navigation dropdown menu with links to About, Categories, Contact, Help/FAQ, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Floating action button that navigates back to the feed, hidden when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: A floating button with popover that allows users to filter feed content by language, supporting both predefined and custom languages with search functionality. Hides when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main application header containing logo, navigation menu dropdown, search bar, and authentication controls (login/dashboard/logout). Features responsive layout with centered logo and stacked menu/auth buttons on the left.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Navigation bar component displaying Feed, Explore, and Upload links with icons. Highlights the active route using button variants.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Multi-step onboarding wizard that introduces users to discovering audio, sharing content, and using the mini-player. Features animated speaker icons, progress tracking, and skip/complete callbacks.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Fixed bottom mini-player bar displaying current audio with thumbnail, playback controls, progress slider, and volume control. Provides play/pause, seek, and close functionality while browsing.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Search input component with icon that updates feed filters and auto-selects default language on focus/change if user hasn't made a language selection.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Tabbed component allowing users to either upload audio files or record directly in the browser with MediaRecorder API. Includes recording timer, 3-hour max duration limit, preview playback, and automatic cleanup of resources.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: A combobox component for selecting or creating custom categories, with a searchable dropdown and inline custom category input when no match is found.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Main audio upload form component that handles file selection, metadata input, authentication checks, and uploads audio to the backend with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Custom hook that validates audio files to ensure they don't exceed a 3-hour maximum duration, providing formatted error messages.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines the available content categories as a constant array including 'All', 'Entertainment', 'Technology', 'Food', 'Sports', 'Politics', 'Music', and 'Work'.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Maps categories to gradient background colors and badge styles for consistent theming, with helper functions to retrieve color classes by category name.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Combines base categories with additional interests like 'Art & Design', 'Gaming', 'Science', etc., to create a comprehensive interests list.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Defines a comprehensive list of 184+ ISO 639-1 languages with code and label pairs, including a 'none' option for non-language content like music.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Hook for managing custom user-added languages with localStorage persistence, duplicate detection, and alphabetical sorting combined with built-in languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: React Query hook for fetching, editing, and deleting the current user's audio posts, with automatic cache invalidation for content and statistics queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Hook for managing onboarding completion state in localStorage, providing functions to mark complete, check status, and reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutations for adding audio posts, tracking listens, and removing posts with toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: React Query hook that fetches user statistics from the backend actor when authenticated.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette inspired by SPEAKR branding, premium typography defaults, glass effects, and card elevation utilities for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: LocalStorage-based draft management system for audio items, converting files to data URLs and providing CRUD operations with change notification subscriptions.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers with K/M/B suffixes and converting seconds to MM:SS duration format.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover images based on category and seed using seeded random numbers, category-specific color schemes, and waveform patterns.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for audio items and comments, and exports an array of 6 mock audio items with sample data including titles, creators, categories, thumbnails, audio URLs, listen counts, languages, and comments.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a simple About page with a heading and placeholder text indicating content is coming soon.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Provides a tabbed authentication page with login and registration forms, including email/password inputs and an interests selection checkbox group for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders a simple Contact page with a heading and placeholder text indicating contact channels are being set up.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays an authenticated user dashboard with statistics, content sections, and an empty state hero; redirects unauthenticated users to the feed page.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Displays a grid of category cards with procedurally generated cover images that navigate to the feed page with the selected category filter applied.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Renders the main feed page with filterable audio cards combining mock items, draft items from local storage, and backend content; supports search, category, and language filtering with appropriate empty states.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Renders a simple Help & FAQ page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the help center is being built.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Displays an onboarding wizard component and handles completion or skip actions by marking onboarding complete and navigating to the feed page.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Renders a simple Privacy Policy page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the policy is being finalized.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders a simple Terms of Service page with a heading and placeholder text indicating the terms are being prepared.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Displays an upload page with a heading and description that renders an UploadForm component for users to share audio content.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: React context provider that manages audio playback state (play, pause, seek, volume) using an HTML5 Audio element and exposes controls via usePlayer hook.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store with persistence for feed filtering state (search query, category, languages) that auto-selects browser default language on first load.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens using OKLCH, typography, animations, and design system variables for a component library.
project_state.json: Project state tracking existing and pending features related to header layout reorganization, logo enlargement, and slogan text updates.
